title: Create a Module Federation consumer
description: Scaffold a React Module Federation consumer. The bundler is selected at generation time; remotes are registered dynamically at runtime from public/mf-remotes.json (no build-time remotes list).

directory.description: Directory the consumer is generated in, e.g. `apps/my-consumer`. The project name is inferred from the trailing path segment.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the consumer in?

bundler.description: Bundler used by the consumer. Final choice; cannot be switched later.

x-prompt.message: Which bundler should the consumer use?

port.description: Dev-server port the consumer listens on.

providerNames.description: Comma-separated list of provider project names to generate alongside this consumer. Each becomes an `@nx/react:provider` app sibling to the consumer and an entry in `public/mf-remotes.json`. Defaults to `[my-provider]` as a placeholder (no provider is generated until you pass the flag explicitly).
